headline: Baird Upgrades Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (CFG) to Outperform from Neutral with a $65 Price Target
summary: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On March 9, 2026, Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) was upgraded by Baird to Outperform from Neutral with an unchanged price target of $65. The firm said recent weakness in bank stocks has created more attractive risk-reward opportunities, […]
